title: PC1 RTX 4090 Qwen3.6-27B + spiritbuun DFlash GGUF / buun-llama-cpp validation
purpose: Validate whether spiritbuun/Qwen3.6-27B-DFlash-GGUF gives quality-preserving throughput gains over the known clean Qwen3.6-27B no-draft llama.cpp baseline on one RTX 4090.

model.quality_floor: Use Q8_0 drafter first. Do not start with Q4_K_M drafter; README says acceptance drops ~17 points.

first_comparison: Sequential baseline then candidate on same target quant/file, because a 24GB 4090 will not keep two Qwen3.6-27B targets resident at once.

gates.quality: All prompts pass: JSON parses, Python AST parses, exactly-5-bullets obeyed, 120-word answer stays 90-150 words, no markdown fences where forbidden, no replacement chars, no repeated junk, no malformed imports/routes/braces, no early cutoff.
gates.speed: Candidate median completion tok/s >= 1.3x baseline to continue research; >=1.5x for BenchLoop-ready win; >=2.0x strong win.
gates.reliability: No CUDA OOM, server crash, request timeout, non-2xx response, or hard-fail hit across full cycle.
gates.kill: Any corruption resembling prior bad spec-dec output kills the lane immediately, regardless of tok/s.

benchloop_ready: manual_review quality_pass=true AND reliability_pass=true AND speed_pass=true AND speedup_vs_baseline>=1.5 AND 3 consecutive clean cycles.
